neighborhoods.name: Kittanning Downtown
neighborhoods.description: County seat on the Allegheny River with historic buildings, courthouse, and community park
neighborhoods.character: Small-town riverside, county seat, community park

housing.predominantType: Victorian houses, row homes, and older apartments

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Kittanning. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Ford City
neighborhoods.description: Former glass-making town along the Allegheny with affordable housing and community character

housing.predominantType: Row houses and modest single-family homes

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Kittanning's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Rural Armstrong County
neighborhoods.description: Surrounding rural areas with very affordable properties, farms, and natural beauty
neighborhoods.character: Rural, very affordable, farms and forests

housing.predominantType: Farmhouses, rural homes, and mobile homes

neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Freeport / Leechburg
neighborhoods.description: Small towns with slightly better amenities, school access, and river recreation
neighborhoods.character_notes: Family-friendly area with good schools, parks, and community amenities. Popular with active retirees and families.
